ItacAcademyItem.Name: Sollevati - Roma (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Chain hanging from a portable case
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Description of emblem not found in Montague, Index of emblems.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
